test.name: Menu Checks

kw.name: Start Recording
kw.doc: Triggers the video and audio recording.

kw.name: Ir.Press Back
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Ir.Press Back' found.

kw.name: Stop Recording
kw.doc: Stops the video and audio recording.

test.status: No keyword with name 'Ir.Press Back' found.

errors.msg:

The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception:
Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Users\pepeb\Documents\ONYX\oreganqa-automation\oreganlibs\StbController.py", line 656, in __init__ self.ir_device.auth() File "c:\Users\pepeb\Documents\dev\lib\site-packages\broadlink\device.py", line 184, in auth response = self.send_packet(0x65, packet) File "c:\Users\pepeb\Documents\dev\lib\site-packages\broadlink\device.py", line 309, in send_packet raise e.NetworkTimeoutError( broadlink.exceptions.NetworkTimeoutError: [Errno -4000] Network timeout: No response received within 10s
